mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM promotion_history WHERE tier_promo_status IN ('CONFIRMATION_OF_PROMOTION', 'TIER_APPLIED')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM promotion_history ph JOIN tier_config tc_tgt ON tc_tgt.tier_config_id = ph.target_tier_config_id
AND tc_tgt.tier_config_tier = #{targetTier}

SELECT ph.tier_promotion_id AS tierPromotionId, ph.employee_id AS employeeId, e.employee_name AS employeeName, e.employee_tier AS employeeTier, tc_cur.tier_config_tier AS currentTier, tc_tgt.tier_config_tier AS targetTier, ph.tier_accumulated_point AS tierAccumulatedPoint, tc_tgt.tier_config_promotion_point AS targetPromotionPoint, ph.tier_promo_status AS tierPromoStatus, ph.tier_reviewed_at AS tierReviewedAt, ph.created_at AS createdAt FROM promotion_history ph JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = ph.employee_id JOIN tier_config tc_cur ON tc_cur.tier_config_id = ph.current_tier_config_id JOIN tier_config tc_tgt ON tc_tgt.tier_config_id = ph.target_tier_config_id WHERE ph.tier_promotion_id = #{candidateId}

SELECT 'PROMOTION' AS eventType, tc_cur.tier_config_tier AS fromTier, tc_tgt.tier_config_tier AS toTier, ph.tier_accumulated_point AS tierAccumulatedPoint, tc_tgt.tier_config_promotion_point AS targetPromotionPoint, ph.tier_promo_status AS status, NULL AS occurredDate, COALESCE(ph.tier_reviewed_at, ph.created_at) AS occurredAt FROM promotion_history ph JOIN tier_config tc_cur ON tc_cur.tier_config_id = ph.current_tier_config_id JOIN tier_config tc_tgt ON tc_tgt.tier_config_id = ph.target_tier_config_id WHERE ph.employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY COALESCE(ph.tier_reviewed_at, ph.created_at) ASC, ph.created_at ASC
